title: César Rougé

[[Occitania (administrative region)|Occitania]], France |height = {{convert|1.81|m|ftin|0|order=flip|abbr=on}} |weight = {{convert|87|kg|stlb|abbr=on|order=flip}} | position = {{rlp|SH|HK|SO|FB}} | club1 = {{nowrap|[[Catalans Dragons]]}} | year1start = 2021 | year1end = 25 | appearances1 = 49 | tries1 = 8 | goals1 = 4 | fieldgoals1 = 0 | points1 = 24 | club2 = {{nowrap|→ [[Whitehaven RLFC|Whitehaven]]}} | year2start = 2022{{small|(loan)}} | year2end = | appearances2 = 2 | tries2 = 0 | goals2 = 2 | fieldgoals2 = 0 | points2 = 4 | club3 = {{nowrap|→ [[Hull KR]]}} | year3start = 2023{{small|(loan)}} | year3end = | appearances3 = 1 | tries3 = 0 | goals3 = 0 | fieldgoals3 = 0 | points3 = 0 | club4 = {{nowrap|[[Toulouse Olympique]]}} | year4start = 2026 | year4end = present | appearances4 = 0 | tries4 = 0 | goals4 = 0 | fieldgoals4 = 0 | points4 = 0 | teamA = [[France national rugby league team|France]] | yearAstart = 2022 | yearAend = present | appearancesA = 7 | triesA = 3 | goalsA = 6 | fieldgoalsA = 0 | pointsA = 24 | new = yes | source = {{Cite web |url=https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/cesar-rouge/summary.html |title=Rugby League Project |access-date=30 July 2022 |archive-date=30 July 2022 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220730200921/https://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/cesar-rouge/summary.html |url-status=live }} | updated = {{date|{{REVISIONTIMESTAMP}}|DMY}} }} '''César Rougé''' (born 3 October 2002) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|sh|hk}} or {{rlp|so}} for [[Toulouse Olympique]] in the [[Super League]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level. ==Playing career== ===Catalans Dragons=== In 2021 he made his [[Catalans Dragons|Catalans]] debut in the [[Super League]] against [[St Helens RLFC|St Helens]].{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/58123964|title=Super League: St Helens 34-12 Catalans Dragons - Saints beat Dragons to close gap at top|publisher=BBC|date=7 August 2021|accessdate=30 July 2022|archive-date=30 July 2022|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20220730201123/https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/58123964|url-status=live}} ===Toulouse Olympique=== On 17 January 2026 it was reported that he had signed for [[Toulouse Olympique]] in the [[Super League]] on a one-year deal.{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=17 Jan 2026|author=Louis Chapman Coombe|title=Toulouse Olympique bolster ranks as French international makes cross-Super League switch|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/toulouse-olympique-bolster-ranks-as-french-international-makes-cross-super-league-switch}} ==References== {{reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/fiche-619-rouge-cesar/ Catalans Dragons profile] *[https://www.ffr13.fr/joueur/cesar-rouge/ France profile] *[https://www.nrl.com/players/rugby-league-world-cup/france/cesar-rouge/ French profile] {{Toulouse Olympique squad}} {{France 2021 Rugby League World Cup squad}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Rougé, César}} [[Category:2002 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:21st-century French sportsmen]] [[Category:Catalans Dragons players]] [[Category:France national rugby league team players]] [[Category:French rugby league players]] [[Category:Hull Kingston Rovers players]] [[Category:Rugby league hookers]] [[Category:Rugby league halfbacks]] [[Category:Rugby league five-eighths]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Carcassonne]] [[Category:Toulouse Olympique players]] [[Category:Whitehaven R.L.F.C. players]] {{France-rugbyleague-bio-stub}}
